response.step_by_step_log: Scanned video. The segment from 00:00 to 03:51 contains no vocal music. At 03:51, on-screen text identified '恋は戦争' (Koi wa Sensou) with 'Lyrics, Music: ryo (supercell)'. The performer is Raora. Used search string '"Koi wa Sensou" supercell Japanese and English lyrics' to find the lyrics. Found lyrics and translation for 'Koi wa Sensou'.
response.global_summary: The video begins with a gameplay sequence featuring character dialogue and tasks. At 03:51, the video transitions into a musical performance of 'Koi wa Sensou' by Raora, featuring on-screen text identifying the song and its creators.

scenes.description: Gameplay segment with characters interacting and performing tasks in a 3D environment.
Raora performs 'Koi wa Sensou' (Love is War) in a virtual studio setting, with on-screen text identifying the song title and credits.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
もう行き場がないわ
この恋の熱量
混ざり合う感情
行き止まりの空気と
吐き出した言葉は
私を刺した

もしも私に
心が無ければ
こんな事も無かったのにな
だけどこの心は
あなたを求めて
暴れだす

恋は戦争
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I have nowhere left to go
The heat of this love
Intermingling feelings
The dead-end air and
The words I spat out
Stabbed at me

If I
Had no heart
Then none of this would have happened, but
Even so, this heart
Craves you
And starts to run wild

Love is war
